zh.lifeSummary: 當David Carwithen於大約1590年出生在英國時，他的父親Digery Dickery Carwithen31歲，母親Maria “Mary” Biewett26歲。他於1624年與Grace Alice Alcock在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可薩萊姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1665年8月31日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼素福爾可素爾德享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当David Carwithen于大约1590年出生在英国时，他的父亲Digery Dickery Carwithen31岁，母亲Maria “Mary” Biewett26岁。他于1624年与Grace Alice Alcock在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可薩萊姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1665年8月31日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼素福爾可素爾德享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.
After the English took over in the 1660s, the colony was renamed New York, after the Duke of York

en.lifeSummary: When David Carwithen was born about 1590, in England, his father, Digery Dickery Carwithen, was 31 and his mother, Maria “Mary” Biewett, was 26. He married Grace Alice Alcock in 1624, in Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 31 August 1665, in Southold, Suffolk, New York Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 76.

Il a épousé Grace Alice Alcock en 1624, à Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 31 août 1665, à Southold, Suffolk, New York Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 76 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: David Carwithenが約1590年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Digery Dickery Carwithenは31歳，母Maria “Mary” Biewettは26歳であった。1624年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスサレムでGrace Alice Alcockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1665年8月31日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ヨーク コロニースフォルクソウソルドで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: David Carwithen(이)가 대략 1590년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Digery Dickery Carwithen(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Maria “Mary” Biewett(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1624년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 살렘에서 Grace Alice Alcock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1665년 8월 31일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 수폴크 소우토드에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando David Carwithen nasceu aproximadamente 1590, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Digery Dickery Carwithen, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Maria “Mary” Biewett, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Grace Alice Alcock em 1624, em Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 31 de agosto de 1665, em Southold, Suffolk, New York Colony, British Colonial America, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда David Carwithen родился около 1590 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Digery Dickery Carwithen было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Maria “Mary” Biewett, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Grace Alice Alcock в 1624 г. в местности сеилем, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 31 августа 1665 г. в местности соутолд, суффолк, ню ерк колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando David Carwithen nació aproximadamente 1590, en Inglaterra, su papá, Digery Dickery Carwithen, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Maria “Mary” Biewett, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Grace Alice Alcock en 1624, en Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 31 de agosto de 1665, en Southold, Suffolk, New York Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 76 años.
